findings.issue: buildSystemPrompt concatenates 9 large static strings on every call, including full ACTION examples and repetitive formatting instructions.
findings.suggestion: Pre-build the immutable system prompt sections once at startup, concatenate only dynamic parts (signals, session, emotional context) per request.
findings.est_impact: Saves ~2000 tokens/request across the system prompt baseline

findings.issue: POST /chat logs full conversation history to session.jsonl even for routine queries, then loads last 10 messages per request.
findings.suggestion: Store session in memory with periodic flush, or load only when explicitly needed for context.
findings.est_impact: Reduces I/O and unnecessary serialization overhead

findings.issue: loadMemory/saveMemory pattern repeated; loadDiscordSignals rebuilds signal list from file on every trading message.
findings.suggestion: Cache signals in memory with TTL (e.g., 5 min), invalidate on /paste-signals or scraper completion.
findings.est_impact: Reduces file I/O and regex scanning on frequent trading context calls

findings.issue: POST /do endpoint duplicates desktop control logic already in handleAction (open, type, click, scroll, press).
findings.suggestion: Remove /do or route to handleAction to consolidate logic.

findings.issue: routeToAgent catches all agent fetch errors silently (return null), so failures appear as 'no routing' instead of alerting user or logging.
findings.suggestion: Log agent routing failures and return { reply: 'Agent error: ' + e.message, agent: 'error' } to provide transparency.
findings.est_impact: Prevents silent failures and aids debugging when agents are down

findings.issue: POST /research calls Claude twice if content is extracted: once to validate relevance, once implicitly in memory save.
findings.suggestion: Single pass: extract, analyze, save in one response.
findings.est_impact: Saves ~1 API call per research request

findings.issue: isTradingMessage regex is 51 terms long and runs on every message; will match false positives like 'long day' or 'short answer'.
findings.suggestion: Require 2+ matching terms or stricter word boundaries (\b) to filter noise.
findings.est_impact: Reduces false signal routes and unnecessary Claude Haiku calls

findings.issue: POST /chat catches action parsing errors but doesn't differentiate between JSON parse failures and handleAction timeouts.
findings.suggestion: Return structured error: { error: 'parse' | 'timeout' | 'execution', detail } so client can retry or escalate.
findings.est_impact: Better error handling and user feedback
